data.body: B1 merged #459. B2 (#479) + B4 (#480) implemented, signed-off, pushed as a stack to Gerrit. Guardrail 1 enforced: only importer sets the sink; interactive writes stay one-commit-per-event (unit test). Local build green (lint/typecheck/full default suite/integration B4 tests). Stack watcher launched for auto-submit + child-close on Verified +1.
